howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Planning your perfect trip takes just three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our curated tours, filter by destination, type, or budget and find your perfect match.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Secure your spot with an easy online booking. We'll confirm everything and prepare your itinerary.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Pack your bags and let us handle the rest. From pickup to drop-off, we've got you covered.
gallery.title: Unforgettable Highlights
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I book a tour?
faq.a1: Simply browse our tours, select your preferred option, choose your date and group size, then complete the secure online checkout. You'll receive a confirmation email immediately.
faq.q2: What is included in the tour price?
faq.a2: Each tour listing clearly states what's included — transportation, accommodation, meals, and entry fees. Please check the tour details page for the full inclusions list.
faq.a3: Absolutely! We offer tailor-made experiences for individuals, families, and groups. Contact us through the Tailor-Made page and our team will design a trip just for you.
faq.a4: We offer flexible cancellation on most tours. Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before departure. Please check the specific tour for its policy.
faq.q5: Are your tours suitable for families with children?
faq.a5: Yes! Many of our tours are family-friendly and welcome children. Each tour page notes the suitability and any age restrictions that may apply.
cta.title: Let Us Design Your Dream Trip
